title: Buying Attraction Tickets 景点买票
scene: 一家人到景点售票处买门票。

lines.en: Hello, two adult tickets and one child ticket, please.
lines.zh: 你好，请给我两张成人票和一张儿童票。

lines.en: Sure! Is the child over one point two meters tall?
lines.zh: 好的！孩子超过一米二了吗？

lines.en: No, he's one point one meters. He's eight years old.
Great! Children under one point two meters get in for free.
lines.zh: 太好了！一米二以下的儿童免费入园。

lines.en: That's wonderful! How much are the adult tickets?
They're sixty yuan each. So one hundred and twenty yuan for both.
lines.zh: 每张六十元。两张一共一百二十元。

lines.en: Do the tickets include the boat ride?
No, the boat ride is an extra twenty yuan per person.
lines.zh: 不包含，坐船每人额外二十元。

lines.en: OK, we'll buy the boat tickets too. Here is the money.
lines.zh: 好的，我们也买船票。这是钱。

lines.en: Thank you! Here are your tickets. Enjoy your visit!
lines.zh: 谢谢！这是您的票。祝您游览愉快！
